des_semantics.zeta: mean finished-goods ration inventory over the episode
des_semantics.epsilon: mean pending backorder quantity over the episode
des_semantics.phi: mean spare assembly capacity over the episode
des_semantics.tau: mean net-requirement coverage time proxy over the episode
des_semantics.kappa_dot: mean cost divided by the Monte-Carlo reference cost
des_semantics.kappa_ref: mean episode cost across the calibration Monte-Carlo sample
